title: Omnishape
description: A mod for creating custom shaped blocks. Currently some features are WIP however the basic shapes work
body:
This mod adds a crafting block that allows players to take a frame block and combine it with any solid opaque block and then edit the corners via a 3d menu.

The mod is still in alpha so certain features may not work and there is a possibility of crashes however if you do encounter crashes please post the log/error in the following github issues page and I will hopefully be able to fix them.

[https://github.com/maxryan008/omnishape/issues](https://github.com/maxryan008/omnishape/issues)

(This mod also has compatability with Galacticraft 5 allowing you to use the frame blocks as covers on any of the wires from the mod)
